summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Zen Hub Pro - Cronus Zen script generator. Backend API achieved 100% success rate (21/21 tests passed). Frontend UI fully functional with all key features working correctly including dashboard stats, weapon management, AI expert chat, and script generation.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay occasionally blocks navigation clicks after script viewing
ui_bugs.impact: Minor UX issue - can be resolved by pressing Escape or clicking outside modal

design_issues.issue: Hydration warnings about span elements in select/option tags
design_issues.impact: Console warnings only - no functional impact

passed_tests: Complete weapons CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Weapon filtering by category and game
AI Expert chat integration with Gemini
